title: coccoloba schiedeana
intro: Coccoloba schiedeana, also known as the Schiede's coccoloba or beach morning glory, is a flowering plant species in the family Polygonaceae. This plant is native to the coastal regions of Central America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The roots, leaves, and stems of Coccoloba schiedeana contain various bioactive compounds, which have been reported to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Coccoloba schiedeana include treating skin conditions, wounds, and infections, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
